message:
fix(demo): fix test failures from Esc overlay-priority and form validation

- Update global_shortcuts_e2e tests to match Esc overlay-priority behavior
  (Esc now closes overlays in stack order per bd-iuvb.17.5)
- Fix form_validation_e2e email test: set field value directly
- Fix form_validation.rs: add SHIFT modifier support for M key toggle
- Fix terminal_capabilities_ux_a11y: use contains() for key matching
- Remove invalid 'state' field from KeyEvent constructors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
